Discover Rwanda with Confidence - Premium Car Rentals for Every Journey

Experience the Land of a Thousand Hills in comfort and style. Whether you're exploring Kigali's vibrant streets, embarking on a safari adventure, or traveling for business, our reliable fleet is ready for your Rwandan journey.

Reserve Your CarExplore Our Fleet

Why we deserve your trust

Kigali Car Rentals is your trusted partner for premium, reliable, and affordable car rental services in Rwanda — where comfort, safety, and customer satisfaction come first.

Years of Experience

10+

Serving Kigali and all of Rwanda with reliable and professional car rental services.

1,500+

Trusted by locals, tourists, and corporate clients for premium car rentals.

Available Vehicles

Our Services

Professional car rental and transportation solutions in Kigali.

Car Rental

Daily, weekly, and monthly rental packages with flexible pickup and special long-term discounts.

  • Flexible Pickup
  • Discounted Long-Term Rates
  • No Hidden Fees

City & Country Tours

Guided and self-drive tours to explore Rwanda's cities, countryside, and hidden gems.

  • Expert Guides
  • Custom Routes
  • All Inclusive

Airport Transfers

24/7 airport pickup and drop-off services with meet & greet and flight tracking.

  • Meet & Greet
  • Flight Tracking
  • Fixed Pricing

Chauffeur Services

Professional drivers for events, business meetings, and leisure travel in luxury vehicles.

  • Licensed Drivers
  • Luxury Vehicles
  • Event Ready

Need a Custom Solution?

Contact us for custom packages, group bookings, or special requirements.
